title: Selling Ebooks Without Stripe: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose That Actually Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan and want to sell ebooks without Stripe, you're not alone. Stripe restricts accounts from these countries, leaving you with limited options for selling and getting paid. PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip also have their own blacklists, excluding creators from various countries. This post will show you what nobody tells you before you choose a solution that actually works.
What Each Option Actually Offers

You might think that PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip are your default choices for selling ebooks online. However, their country restrictions and KYC requirements often block creators from certain territories. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) provide a permanent structural alternative. They don't require KYC, have no buyer account requirements, and support 300+ coins. This means you can sell ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without worrying about payment processing hassles.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often restrict or suspend accounts from certain countries due to 'regulatory requirements' or 'country risk.' In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle and NOWPayments are designed to work in any country, without any restrictions. This is because they use blockchain technology, which allows for secure, decentralized, and censorship-resistant transactions. You can sell ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without fear of account restrictions or frozen funds.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe often charge high fees, ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. They also have strict requirements for refunds, chargebacks, and disputes. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle charge lower fees, typically around 1% + $0.10 per transaction. They also have more flexible refund and dispute policies, making it easier to manage your business. With Unchained Commerce, you can sell ebooks online without incurring high fees or complicated payment processing costs.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle automates delivery and payment verification, so you can focus on creating more ebooks and growing your business.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When you sell ebooks with traditional payment processors, you often need to manually handle delivery and payment verification. This can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, however, automates delivery and payment verification, so you can focus on creating more ebooks and growing your business. With their Core Engine, you can set up automated delivery, PDF receipts, and no payment processor account requirements. This means you can sell ebooks online without worrying about manual payment processing or delivery.
